hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'src/.*\.(ts|tsx|css)$'; then jq -n --arg f "$FILE" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":("File edited: " + $f + ". Run a code review per /engineering:code-review: naming conventions (o-prefix variables, a-prefix parameters, PascalCase components), React 19 patterns (useActionState, useMemo), TypeScript strict compliance, accessibility (aria-*). Report any violations.")}}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Queuing code review for edited source file...

hooks.command: if ! npm run test:unit >&2; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Unit tests failed — fix failing tests before committing."}'; fi
